chapter_title.en: Age of Ignorance, the transience of this world and the state of its inhabitants

text: [بعثة النبي (صلى الله عليه وآله وسلم) :] بَعَثَهُ حِينَ لاَ عَلَمٌ قَائِمٌ، وَلاَ مَنَارٌ سَاطِعٌ، وَلاَ مَنْهَجٌ وَاضِحٌ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: Allāh deputed the Prophet when no sign of guidance existed, no beacon was giving light and no passage was clear.
